title: Mat's Mod Mash
description:
Minecraft is kinda boring.  But with this Mat™ certified modpack mash, it doesn't have to be!

This mopack aims to deliver a Vanilla^2 experience with the primary content mods being Create, Charm, and the legendary Twilight Forest.
body: This mopack aims to deliver a Vanilla^2 experience with the primary content mods being Create, Charm, and the legendary Twilight Forest.  In addition to the content is a slew of optimization and performance enchanting mods for client and servers such as Sodium, Starlight, Spark, DynamicFPS, Farsight, ect.....  And of course one deoptimization feature in the form of the Irish Shaders mod with the beautiful Complementary Shaders pre-configured to give an eye-pleasing yet still vanilla feel view.
